workflow.name: ClickHouse HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate ClickHouse HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare ClickHouse inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/clickhouse-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[clickhouse]
10.31.85.11 role=clickhouse name=clickhouse-01
10.31.85.12 role=clickhouse name=clickhouse-02
10.31.85.13 role=clickhouse name=clickhouse-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install ClickHouse container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/clickhouse-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: clickhouse
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/clickhouse-inventory.ini /tmp/clickhouse-runtime.yml

data.label: Render ClickHouse cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/clickhouse-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: clickhouse
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/clickhouse
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/clickhouse/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            clickhouse:
              image: clickhouse/clickhouse-server:24.8
              container_name: octastack-clickhouse
              restart: unless-stopped
              environment:
                CLICKHOUSE_DB: "app_db"
                CLICKHOUSE_USER: "app_user"
                CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD: "change-me"
              ports:
                - "8123:8123"
                - "9000:9000"
              volumes:
                - data:/var/lib/clickhouse
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy ClickHouse cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/clickhouse-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/clickhouse/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/clickhouse/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/clickhouse/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/clickhouse-inventory.ini /tmp/clickhouse-deploy.yml

data.label: Document ClickHouse topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/clickhouse-topology.md <<'EOF'
# ClickHouse HA topology

Members:
- clickhouse-01: 10.31.85.11 (clickhouse)
- clickhouse-02: 10.31.85.12 (clickhouse)
- clickhouse-03: 10.31.85.13 (clickhouse)

This example deploys one ClickHouse container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/clickhouse-topology.md

data.label: Validate ClickHouse cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/clickhouse-inventory.ini clickhouse -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
